llm_unified_plan.aggregation_instruction: Combine the SQL results to show campaigns with their associated segments and labels. Format as a list of campaigns with nested segment information.

passes.expected_result: List of campaigns with segment IDs and segment labels

sql.query: SELECT c.CAMPAIGNID, c.CAMPAIGNNAME, bcs.SEGMENTID, bcs.LABELSSEGMENT FROM dim_campaign c LEFT JOIN br_campaign_segment bcs ON c.CAMPAIGNID = bcs.CAMPAIGNID LIMIT 50

passes.subtask: Retrieve campaigns with their associated segments and labels from the local snapshot.
